title: Ubiquiti U6-Enterprise - UniFi6 Enterprise
description: UniFi Access Point WiFi 6 Enterprise (U6-Enterprise) is a high-performance Triple-band WiFi 6/6E Access Point (2.4 GHz, 5 GHz and 6 GHz) and is the ideal AP for very busy places like are halls, warehouses or offices. The U6-Enterprise is capable of great throughputs - on both 5 GHz and 6 GHz (4Ã4 MU-MIMO) it's 4800 Mbps in each band when used with 160 MHz bandwidth and in 2.4 GHz (2Ã2 MIMO) it is 574 Mbps , which allows it to support more than 600 simultaneously connected clients. The Access… Triple-band WiFi 6E, support 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax (WiFi 6 and WiFi 6E) 5 GHz bandwidth up to 4804 Mbps (4Ã4 MU-MIMO) 6 GHz bandwidth up to 4804 Mbps (4Ã4 MU-MIMO) 2.4 GHz bandwidth up to 574 Mbps (2Ã2 MIMO) Antenna gain - 2.4 GHz (3.2 dBi), 5 GHz (5.3 dBi) and 6 GHz (6 dBi) WPA/WPA2/WPA3 encryption 2.5-Gigabit LAN port Power supply via 802.3at or passive 44 to 57 V PoE, consumption 22 W Supported by UniFi Controller since version 7.2.91 To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network Controller from the official website, thanks to which the entire network can be controlled. The indisputable advantage of UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management will allow you to upload maps and set basic parameters as well as advanced functions such as SSID, guest account, start page, traffic statistics and the list and status of associated clients… Fast Roaming - uninterrupted transition between individual APs Wireless uplink (suitable where it is impossible to get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed…
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 + 6 GHz (triple band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4804 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Transmission speed - 6GHz [Mb/s] 4804 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Tx power 6GHz [dBm] 26 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 6GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 10 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 3,2, 5,3, 6 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Other features Bluetooth Power Power over Ethernet 44 .. 57V DC Power type PoE PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 22 Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Ceiling Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 1200 Width [mm] 220 Height [mm] 48 Depth [mm] 220
